basic_details.short_information: Good opportunity for specialist and practicing MBBS doctors in Mumbai to engage with RCF Ltd., a Navratna PSU, as Honorary Visiting Doctors at its Chembur hospital or as Panel Doctors across 10 Mumbai/Navi Mumbai localities. Appointment is for three years from 01/01/2027 to 31/12/2029. Applications must reach DGM (HR) U, RCF Trombay Unit by 31-07-2026.

qualification.details: Candidates must satisfy all eligibility conditions as stated in the notification. Applications that are incomplete, unsigned, or not in the prescribed format will not be considered.

selection_process: Selection will be made through a personal Interview. Eligible candidates will be intimated in writing about the date

and venue of the Interview. The honorarium and duration/frequency of visits (for Honorary Doctors) and the rates of reimbursement per patient (for Panel Doctors) will be communicated by the Selection Committee at the time of the personal Interview.
Applications will be screened for completeness
or those not accompanied by attested photostat copies of educational qualifications and experience certificates will be rejected.
Shortlisted eligible candidates will be called for a personal Interview. Date
and venue will be intimated in writing. No written/telephonic communication will be entertained after the closing date of application submission.
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply in the prescribed application format provided in the notification (separate formats for Honorary Doctors and Panel Doctors). The duly filled and signed application form, along with attested photostat copies of educational qualifications and experience certificates, must be sent by post to the Deputy General Manager (HR) U, First Floor, Room No. 117-A, Administrative Building, Chembur, Mumbai - 400 074 so as to reach by 31-07-2026.
Documents to be sent along with the Application:
Duly filled and signed application in the prescribed format (separate for Honorary Doctor / Panel Doctor).
Recent passport-size photograph affixed and duly signed on the application form.
Attested photostat copies of all educational qualification certificates.
Attested photostat copies of experience certificates from all organizations/hospitals.
Copy of valid Medical Council Registration certificate (with number, date, and state).
For Panel Doctors: details of clinic/dispensary including address, telephone, timings, facilities available, and details of any existing empanelment with other organizations.
Research papers / articles published, if any (for Honorary Doctors).
Deputy General Manager (HR) U, Human Resource Department (Trombay Unit), First Floor, Room No. 117-A, Administrative Building, Chembur, Mumbai - 400 074.
Write the post applied for at the top of the left-hand corner of the envelope. The application must reach on or before 31-07-2026.

content_sections.heading: Rashtriya Chemicals and Fertilizers Limited (RCF) Honorary Doctors & Panel Doctors Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Rashtriya Chemicals and Fertilizers Limited (RCF), Trombay Unit, Chembur, Mumbai has invited applications from eligible Specialist Doctors for Honorary Doctor assignments (31 posts across 19 specialties) at its hospital at Chembur, Mumbai, and from practicing MBBS doctors for Panel Doctor empanelment (15 posts) across 10 localities in Mumbai/Navi Mumbai. The tenure of appointment for both categories will be three years. Applications must be sent by post to reach by 31-07-2026. Download RCF Honorary Doctors & Panel Doctors Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: RCF Honorary Doctors & Panel Doctors Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: Good opportunity for specialist and practicing MBBS doctors in Mumbai to engage with RCF Ltd., a Navratna PSU, as Honorary Visiting Doctors at its Chembur hospital or as Panel Doctors across 10 Mumbai/Navi Mumbai localities. Appointment is for three years from 01/01/2027 to 31/12/2029. Applications must reach DGM (HR) U, RCF Trombay Unit by 31-07-2026.

content_sections.heading: RCF Honorary Doctors & Panel Doctors Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: A total of 31 Honorary Doctor posts have been notified across 19 medical specialties for visiting OPD, Consultation, Surgeries, and Emergency services at RCF’s Chembur hospital. An additional 15 Panel Doctor posts have been notified for 10 localities in Mumbai/Navi Mumbai for extending medical treatment to RCF employees, ex-employees, and their dependent family members. Honorary Doctors - Specialty-wise Vacancy Details Panel Doctors - Area-wise Vacancy Details

rows.minimum_experience: 5 years with attachment to Cardiac Hospital with Cath. Lab facilities
5 years with attachment to specialized Centre
5 years with attachment to specialized Centre

rows.qualification: MBBS (Registered Medical Practitioner) with own dispensary/clinic in the area with full OPD facilities, Computer system (online), routine immunization, and minor surgical procedure facilities

content_sections.heading: RCF Honorary Doctors & Panel Doctors Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must satisfy all eligibility conditions as stated in the notification. Applications that are incomplete, unsigned, or not in the prescribed format will not be considered.

rows.details: Specialist Doctors possessing the prescribed qualification and minimum experience as per specialty listed in the vacancy table above.
Registered Medical Practitioner with MBBS Degree and minimum 10 years’ experience (excluding internship period).

Applicant must have his/her own dispensary/clinic in the applied panel area with full OPD facilities, Computer system (online), routine immunization, and facilities for conducting minor surgical procedures.
Valid registration with the State Medical Council is required for all applicants.
Candidates applying for both Honorary Doctor and Panel Doctor posts must send separate applications for each.

content_sections.heading: RCF Honorary Doctors & Panel Doctors Recruitment 2026 Age Limit
content_sections.text: No specific age limit has been mentioned in the notification for Honorary Doctor or Panel Doctor positions.

content_sections.heading: RCF Honorary Doctors & Panel Doctors Recruitment 2026 Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee has been mentioned in the notification.

content_sections.heading: RCF Honorary Doctors & Panel Doctors Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be made through a personal Interview. Eligible candidates will be intimated in writing about the date, time, and venue of the Interview. The honorarium and duration/frequency of visits (for Honorary Doctors) and the rates of reimbursement per patient (for Panel Doctors) will be communicated by the Selection Committee at the time of the personal Interview. Stage 1 - Application Scrutiny Applications will be screened for completeness, eligibility, and prescribed format. Incomplete, unsigned applications, applications not in prescribed format, or those not accompanied by attested photostat copies of educational qualifications and experience certificates will be rejected. Stage 2 - Personal Interview Shortlisted eligible candidates will be called for a personal Interview. Date, time, and venue will be intimated in writing. No written/telephonic communication will be entertained after the closing date of application submission.

content_sections.heading: Who should NOT apply for RCF Honorary Doctors & Panel Doctors Recruitment 2026?
content_sections.text: Doctors who do not possess the exact prescribed qualification for the applied specialty (Honorary Doctors). Panel Doctor applicants who do not have their own dispensary/clinic with full OPD facilities in the applied panel area. Candidates who do not hold a valid registration with the State Medical Council. Candidates who submit incomplete, unsigned, or improperly formatted applications without attested copies of qualification and experience certificates. Candidates sending applications after the last date of 31-07-2026. Doctors seeking regular employment - this engagement is purely temporary and honorary in nature with no employer-employee relationship with RCF Ltd.

content_sections.heading: Common mistakes / What to check before applying RCF Honorary Doctors & Panel Doctors Recruitment 2026?
content_sections.text: Not using the prescribed application format separately provided for Honorary Doctors and Panel Doctors - both have different prescribed formats. Not writing the post applied for at the top of the left-hand corner of the envelope before dispatching by post. Applying for both Honorary Doctor and Panel Doctor posts in a single application - separate applications are mandatory for each. Not attaching attested photostat copies of all educational qualification certificates and experience certificates along with the application. Not affixing a duly signed passport size photograph on the application form. Not mentioning the specialty (Honorary Doctors) or location/panel area (Panel Doctors) on the application form. Sending the application by email or any mode other than post - only postal applications will be accepted. Dispatching the application close to the last date - the application must physically reach RCF by 31-07-2026.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for RCF Honorary Doctors & Panel Doctors Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates must apply in the prescribed application format provided in the notification (separate formats for Honorary Doctors and Panel Doctors). The duly filled and signed application form, along with attested photostat copies of educational qualifications and experience certificates, must be sent by post to the Deputy General Manager (HR) U, First Floor, Room No. 117-A, Administrative Building, Chembur, Mumbai - 400 074 so as to reach by 31-07-2026. Documents to be sent along with the Application: Duly filled and signed application in the prescribed format (separate for Honorary Doctor / Panel Doctor). Recent passport-size photograph affixed and duly signed on the application form. Attested photostat copies of all educational qualification certificates. Attested photostat copies of experience certificates from all organizations/hospitals. Copy of valid Medical Council Registration certificate (with number, date, and state). For Panel Doctors: details of clinic/dispensary including address, telephone, timings, facilities available, and details of any existing empanelment with other organizations. Research papers / articles published, if any (for Honorary Doctors). Send Application by Post to: Deputy General Manager (HR) U, Human Resource Department (Trombay Unit), First Floor, Room No. 117-A, Administrative Building, Chembur, Mumbai - 400 074. Write the post applied for at the top of the left-hand corner of the envelope. The application must reach on or before 31-07-2026.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies announced under RCF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Rashtriya Chemicals and Fertilizers Limited (RCF) has announced a total of 46 vacancies, including 31 Honorary Doctor posts and 15 Panel Doctor posts across Mumbai and Navi Mumbai locations.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for RCF Honorary Doctors & Panel Doctors Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for receipt of applications by post is 31 July 2026. Applications received after this date will not be considered.

faq.question: Q3. What qualifications are required for RCF Honorary Doctor posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess the prescribed specialist qualifications such as MD, MS, DNB, MDS, BAMS, BHMS, DM, MCh, or equivalent degrees along with the required post-qualification experience in the relevant specialty.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility criteria for RCF Panel Doctor posts?
faq.answer: Applicants must hold an MBBS degree, have a valid Medical Council registration, possess a minimum of 10 years of experience (excluding internship), and operate their own clinic/dispensary in the specified panel area.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for RCF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No. The notification does not prescribe any application fee for Honorary Doctor or Panel Doctor applications.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for RCF Honorary Doctors & Panel Doctors Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection will be based on application scrutiny followed by a personal interview. Eligible candidates will be informed about the interview schedule separately.

faq.question: Q7. What is the tenure of appointment for RCF Honorary Doctors and Panel Doctors?
faq.answer: The engagement period is three years, with Honorary Doctor appointments scheduled from 01 January 2027 to 31 December 2029.

faq.question: Q8. How can candidates apply for RCF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must submit the prescribed application form along with required documents by post to the Deputy General Manager (HR) U, Trombay Unit, Chembur, Mumbai. Online or email applications are not accepted.
